raw_title: Book Review: ‘Something We Said,’ by Elizabeth Stordeur Pryor
book_title: ‘Something We Said,’ by Elizabeth Stordeur Pryor
description: Elizabeth Stordeur Pryor’s new book, “Something We Said,” is at once a memoir and a history of a racial slur.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘They All Fall in Love at the End,’ by Haili Blassingame
book_title: ‘They All Fall in Love at the End,’ by Haili Blassingame
description: In “They All Fall in Love at the End,” a young Black woman navigates taboo attractions and a contentious political environment while working toward a creative writing degree.
